case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. ANDY V. LU et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. SERVED DEC-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ANDY V.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ANDY V.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ANDY V. DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2012

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LU, ANDY V. $6,178.31 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,465.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ANDY V.
